entities.context: Four albums of increasing pressure. The band that started DSOTM couldn't survive The Wall

entities.name: Comfortably Numb is the perfect epitaph
entities.context: Two versions, compromised into one, neither party satisfied. The song itself embodies the band's ending

entities.name: The right constraints enable innovation, the wrong constraints enable destruction
entities.context: The core insight... DSOTM's 16-track limit forced elegant solutions... The Wall's crisis created a masterpiece and destroyed the band

entities.name: Constraint-creativity connection validated by Pink Floyd arc
entities.context: The Buehler framework found its most vivid examples in Pink Floyd. The band proved the principle across 6 years and 4 albums
